title: 2nd Hand Sam’s George: We did it again - thanks to YOU!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are beyond honoured to...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - We are beyond honoured to announce that we’ve won the George Herald Best of George Award (Best Second Hand Goods Store) for the second year in a row!


> From the bottom of our hearts, we want to thank our loyal customers, the George Herald readers, and our incredible team - Antonio Julies, Joelene Botha, Anneline London-Bagoes, Geraldine Prins, and Jenene Hannekom - for making this possible.


Your continued support, trust, and belief in us mean the world. Our team’s dedication, passion, and hard work are the heartbeat of our success - and this award belongs to all of you.

This isn’t just our victory - it’s a celebration of our community, of the joy of thrifting, and of making a difference together for our environment and our Garden Route family.

Here’s to another year of finding treasures, making memories, and serving you with love and excellence.

Thank you, thank you, thank you! Come visit our store at 76 Market Street, George, to see why we are the best of the best!

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
